title: NotSoFarLands
description: Mod that allows Farlands to generate much closer with configuration for the Overworld and the Nether.
body:
Mod that allows Farlands to generate much closer with configuration for the Overworld and the Nether.

For Minecraft b1.7.3 and Fabric.

![landscape](https://github.com/paulevsGitch/NotSoFarLands/raw/0.1.0/screenshot.png)
